marketCap.title: Crypto Market Cap Analysis
marketCap.description: Analyze total cryptocurrency market capitalization, compare current market value with previous crypto cycles, and understand Bitcoin dominance, market phases, and long-term crypto trends.
marketCap.chartNote: Example market cap chart. Live crypto API data will be connected later.
marketCap.chartTitle: Global Crypto Market Cap Over Time
marketCap.chartDescription: Track how total crypto market capitalization changes across bull markets, bear markets, recovery phases, and long-term Bitcoin cycles.
marketCap.analysisText: The crypto market cap is approaching previous cycle highs, which may indicate an expansion phase. Bitcoin dominance remains elevated, suggesting capital is still concentrated in major assets before a broader altcoin rotation. Risk remains moderate because crypto markets are volatile and highly sensitive to macroeconomic conditions.

content.whatText: Crypto market cap is the total value of cryptocurrency assets in circulation.
content.whyText: Market cap helps investors and researchers understand market size, capital inflows, valuation trends, and whether the crypto market is expanding or cooling down.
content.cyclesText: Crypto market cycles usually move through accumulation, expansion, distribution, and contraction.

faqs.question: What is total crypto market cap?
faqs.answer: Total crypto market cap is the combined value of all cryptocurrencies.

faqs.question: Can market cap predict crypto prices?
faqs.answer: Market cap cannot predict prices with certainty.

faqs.question: How does Bitcoin dominance affect the crypto market?
faqs.answer: Bitcoin dominance shows Bitcoin’s share of the total crypto market.

stablecoins.title: Stablecoin Liquidity Tracker
stablecoins.description: Track where stablecoin liquidity is concentrated across crypto ecosystems.
stablecoins.newbieText: Stablecoins are like digital dollars in crypto.
stablecoins.increaseText: It can mean users sold volatile assets into stablecoins, or new cash entered the ecosystem.
stablecoins.decreaseText: It can mean users are buying crypto assets, moving funds to another chain, or withdrawing liquidity.
stablecoins.chainExplanation: Higher stablecoin concentration can indicate stronger liquidity conditions and more active capital flow.

meaning.high: Stablecoin liquidity is very large across the tracked chains.
meaning.medium: Stablecoin liquidity is healthy across the tracked chains.
meaning.low: Stablecoin liquidity is relatively low across the tracked chains.

narratives.ethereum: Ethereum usually holds deep DeFi and institutional liquidity.
narratives.tron: Tron is heavily used for USDT transfers because fees are low and transfers are fast.
narratives.solana: Solana liquidity can reflect retail activity, meme trading, and fast-moving speculative demand.
narratives.base: Base liquidity can show growing Layer 2 ecosystem activity and Coinbase-linked adoption.
narratives.arbitrum: Arbitrum liquidity is often linked to DeFi activity and Ethereum scaling demand.
narratives.bsc: BSC liquidity often reflects retail trading and lower-fee activity.
narratives.default: This chain shows stablecoin activity inside its ecosystem.

stablecoins.disclaimer: Stablecoin data does not guarantee market direction.
